title: Myths & Legends
description: A dark fantasy mod that introduces mythical creatures, structures, and relics, all inspired by global folklore.
body:
![mythsandlegendslogo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9edf48c77c7a9258b45cec84c6fe8e83bc1f4c64.png)
**Myths & Legends** introduces unique creatures inspired by folklore from around the world, each with distinctive abilities and mechanics.The mod focuses on delivering a dark and immersive atmosphere, bringing a fresh layer of exploration and danger to your Minecraft experience.

**The creatures you’ll encounter include:**
- Imp
- Possessed Armor - Knight/Archer/Inquisitor
- Gargoyle
- The Black Charro
- Condemned Soul
- Alp
- Lampad
- Abaddon
- Karakondjul
- Scorched Sentinel
- Amarok
  
![mobs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a822b3afa0cfde1b7305214af43a682b8934f23_0.webp)

**Items:**
- Fire Heart
- Cursed Core
- Bound Soul Ingot
- Possessed Armor Fragments
- Ironshade Armor
- Soulpiercer Armor
- Stony Shield
- Gargoyle Axe
- Gargoyle Fragment
- Gargoyle Shard
- Altar of the Dead
- Ethereal Flame
- Soulbinder Amulet
- Umbra's Whisper
- Molten Fist
- Scorched Skin
- Scorched Bone
- Core of Abaddon
- Svarog's Ring
- Antique Emblem
- Amarok Essence
- Amarok Hide
- Frosthowl Armor
- Necklace of Torngarsuk

![items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/01c9436a825a1dd4f1266a10548dfd990b7d388e_0.webp)

- **Structures:**
- Ancient Vestiges
- Graveyard
- Old Camp
- Scorched Nest


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![ancient_vestiges_structure](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e09e5e19eabff74a40e0749d5f20f38b5ab5cf81_0.webp)

![graveyard_structure](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd2630fc515612bf1a9315763c3e70d605efb778_0.webp)

</details>

**Note:** _This mod is currently in alpha, meaning it is still under active development. Features and entities may be adjusted or removed in future updates, and there may be bugs or performance issues. I appreciate feedback and patience as I work to improve and expand the mod!_

![requires_geckolib](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/931b4c495e5675476ab08ebfab31380f2b5ba81a.png)
